title: Retro Mango ModPack
description: A server ready Minecraft modpack focused on exploration RPG progression and smooth performance featuring reworked terrain sprawling structures dungeons and villages in a living evolving world
body:
A Living World of Adventure and Progression

This modpack delivers a rich, server-ready Minecraft experience focused on exploration, RPG progression, and smooth performance. Discover reworked terrain, sprawling structures, dungeons, and villages, and venture into new dimensions like The Aether.

Combat is dynamic and skill-based, with classes, spells, relics, and deep skill trees that let you shape your own playstyle. Alongside this, Cobblemon is fully integrated with raids, additions, and navigation tools, making creature collecting and battling a core part of the experience.

Quality-of-life improvements, expanded building and farming, and heavy optimization ensure the pack runs smoothly and is ideal for long-term multiplayer worlds.
